bids.reasoning: At the start of the negotiation, I am targeting maximum utility because there is no time pressure to concede yet. With no opponent offers or messages, I have no evidence about their priorities, so I will open with my highest-value bid across all issues.

I am targeting a very high utility bid (about 0.973) because it is still the very start of the negotiation and there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s only offer was all valueA, which is the worst possible bid for my preferences and shows no real concession pattern yet. I will make a small concession on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.95 because it is still very early in the negotiation and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has repeated the all-valueA offer, which is very poor for me and shows no concession so far, so I will only concede on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the more important issues B, C, and D.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 by conceding only on my lowest-weight issue, issueA, while holding firm on the much more important issues B, C, and D. Time is still very early at t=0.06, and the opponent has not conceded at all from their all-valueA position, so there is no reason yet to make major concessions on my high-weight issues. With no messages to interpret, I rely only on the offer pattern and make a small additional concession to test movement.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.866, since it is still very early at t=0.08 and there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueA with no concession, so I am holding firm on the most important issues C and D while conceding next on issueB after already giving issueA fully.

I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.81 because it is early at t=0.10 and the opponent has shown no concession, repeatedly offering all valueA. I will make a small additional concession on the lower-weight issueB while holding firm on the more important issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.76 by conceding mainly on the lower-weight issues A and B while holding firm on the more important issues C and D. It is still early at t=0.12, so I should not give up high-weight value yet, especially since the opponent has not conceded at all and keeps repeating all valueA offers. No invalid issues or values appeared in the history.

I am targeting a utility around 0.68 by conceding further on issueC while still holding firm on issueD, my most important issue. Time is still early at t=0.14, so I should not collapse to the opponent’s all-valueA position, especially since they have shown no concession and only repeat the same low-utility offer for me.

I am still early in the negotiation, so I am not willing to accept the opponent’s repeated all-valueA bid, which gives me very low utility. Since the opponent has held completely firm so far, I will make one further concession on issueC while preserving issueD, my highest-weight issue, targeting about 0.60 utility for myself.

I am targeting about 0.52 utility by conceding all lower- and mid-weight issues while holding firm on issueD, my highest-weight issue. Time is still early at t=0.18, but the opponent has shown no concession at all and keeps offering the all-valueA bid, so I will make a meaningful but not deadline-level concession. Their behavior suggests they want valueA across issues, so I concede issueC to valueA while preserving issueD at valueD.

I am targeting a still-positive utility around 0.49 while avoiding another unilateral drop on the highest-weight issueD this early. The opponent has held completely firm at all valueA offers, so I am not treating their position as reciprocal concession; at t=0.20 there is still time, so I will probe with a small improvement over their desired low values while protecting issueD.

I am targeting a utility around 0.44, which is still well above reservation while making a meaningful concession from my last offer. Since it is still early at t=0.22 and the opponent has not conceded at all, I will not move all the way to their repeated all-valueA demand, but I will keep only my highest-weight issueD at the top value.

I am targeting about 0.60 utility by keeping issueD at my top value because it is my highest-weight issue, while conceding the lower-weight issues A and B fully. I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.57, since we are only at t=0.26 and it is too early to concede all the way to the opponent’s fixed all-valueA demand. I am targeting the opponent’s repeatedly signaled all-valueA bid, which gives me utility 0.20 but still beats the reservation outcome. Time is past the midpoint and the opponent has shown no concession at all, so securing agreement now is preferable to continuing the deadlock.
